texts.full_text: ==== Hamartoma is a benign tumor of the lung and is mostly located peripherally. It is diagnosed by transbronchial lung biopsy, transbronchial fine needle aspiration, or surgery. Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) is a useful procedure for the pathological examinations of not only mediastinal lymph nodes but also of hilar lesion of the lung \[[@b1]\]. Here, we report a case of pulmonary hamartoma at the hilum that was diagnosed with EBUS-TBNA, showing a unique ultrasound (US) finding. In addition, we assessed the correlation between macropathological sectional view of the resisted tumor and EBUS findings. Case Report =========== AThe case report details the diagnosis of a pulmonary hamartoma located at the hilar region using Endobronchial Ultrasound-Guided Transbronchial Needle Aspiration (EBUS-TBNA), which proved to be effective and less invasive than surgery. texts.full_text: ========== Myasthenia gravis (MG) is an uncommon autoimmune disease mediated by antibodies that attack the postsynaptic acetylcholine receptors (AchRs) at the neuromuscular junction (NMJ), causing fluctuating muscle weakness aggravated with use and relieved with rest. Its 2 main forms are ocular, which is restricted to the eyelid and extraocular musculature and may be asymmetrical, and the generalized form, in which there is also involvement of the bulbar, respiratory muscles, and limbs in varying degrees, but maintains the symmetry of the affected site.^\[[@R1]\]^ In this report, we describ1.1. Epidemiology and Etiology The exact prevalence of myasthenia gravis (MG) can vary, but it is estimated to affect 15 to 150 per 1,000,000 individuals. The prevalence is higher in women, and it can affect individuals of all ages, but it is more common in individuals in their 20s and 30s, and in individuals over 50. The etiology of MG is not fully understood, but it is believed to be a result of a combination of genetic and environmental factors. The genetic factors include a predisposition to autoimmunity, and environmental factors include infections, toxins, and medications. The autoimmune response in MG is mediated by autoantibodies, primarily directed against the nicotinic acetylcholine receptor (AchR) and, in a smaller percentage of cases, against muscle-specific receptor tyrosine kinase (MuSK) and lipoprotein-related protein 4 (LRP4).^\[[@R2]\]^ 1.2. Clinical Presentation The clinical presentation of MG can be highly variable, and the severity of the disease can range from mild, with only ocular symptoms, to severe, with generalized symptoms and the need for mechanical ventilation. texts.full_text: posted on Sonntag,Tag und is part of the series "Beach Vacation". In this article I would like to share my experiences and tips for a successful beach vacation. The summer holidays are just around corner so it's time now! First things first: Where do you plan on spending your days in sun, sand or sea? If none then what can be better than exploring new places with the company of friends. The best part about planning any kind trip is that there isn't one single "right" way to go. However for a beach vacation I recommend considering some factors such as weather conditions and time zone differences if you are flying, or even just deciding whether it's closer by road travel instead (depending on where in Europe we're talking). If the decision has been made that your destination is going straight from sunrise to sunset then pack accordingly. You will need plenty of swimwear along with beach towels and a good hat for protection against those harsh rays! Don't forget also about any other gear you may want such as snorkeling masks, floaties or perhaps even some sand toys if there are little ones traveling too. When it comes to food - the choice is yours but always try local dishes; they're not only tasty and healthy (especially with fresh fish) most importantly a way of immersing yourself in that culture! As for activities i suggest trying out something new like surfing or paddleboarding if y

The Internet, which is a human centered connectivity network where humans generate and consume information, is now evolving to the Internet of Things (IoT) where distributed entities, such as things, exchange and process information without human intervention. The Internet of Everything (IoE), which is a combination of the IoT technology and the Big Data processing technology through connection with a cloud server, has emerged. As technology elements, such as “sensing technology”, “wired/wireless communication and network infrastructure”, “service interface technology”, and “Security technology” have been demanded for IoT implementation, a sensor network, a Machine-to-Machine (M2M) communication, Machine Type Communication (MTC), and so forth have been recently researched. Such an IoT environment may provide intelligent Internet technology services that create a new value to human life by collecting and analyzing data generated among connected things. IoT may be applied to a variety of fields including smart home, smart building, smart city, smart car or connected cars, smart grid, health care, smart appliances and advanced medical services through convergence and combination between existing Information Technology (IT) and various industrial applications. In line with this, various attempts have been made to apply 5G communication systems to IoT networks. For example, technologies such as a sensor network, Machine Type Communication (MTC), and Machine-to-Machine (M2M) communication may be implemented by beamforming, MIMO, and array antennas. Application of a cloud Radio Access Network (RAN) as the above-described Big Data processing technology may also be considered to be as an example of convergence between the 5G technology and the IoT technology. A defendant is accountable for drug quantities associated with a conspiracy provided those quantities were "within the scope of, and reasonably foreseeable in connection with, the criminal activity he jointly agreed to undertake with his coconspirators." Changelog: spoolss: Forward EnumPortsW to winspool.drv This Patch will only work after: "ntdll: Forwarded module can include an extension" -- By by ... Detlef -------------It looks like you're discussing a technical patch related to windows printing services, specifically involving the `spoolss.dll` and its interaction with print monitors. Here's some context based on your message: ### Context: - Objective: The goal is for native printer monitor applications (printmonitors) in Wine—a compatibility layer that allows running Microsoft Windows programs—on Linux or other Unix-like operating systems to work correctly by using `AddPortW`. - Solution Approach: - Instead of implementing a direct solution within the system, this patch redirects calls from `EnumPortsW` found inside `spoolss.dll`, which is part of Wine's implementation for Windows' printing subsystem. - The redirection forwards these function requests to an existing driver: `winspool.drv`. This allows leveraging native functionalities that are already implemented in a standard way by the operating system. ### Technical Details: - Forwarding EnumPortsW: * By forwarding this call, Wine can use Windows' own mechanisms for enumerating ports (which is crucial when adding new printer connections). - Dependency: - The patch relies on another modification or feature: "ntdll: Forwarded module can include an extension". This suggests that the system must support extended functionality in forwarded modules to handle additional operations required by this redirection. ### Communication Context: The message appears as part of a thread involving technical discussions about maintaining and testing functionalities within Wine

texts.full_text: ( www.harryspiano.com), the book about his early childhood written by daughter Susan McCray, includes a CD with two of his compositions performed by him. Be sure to bring your copy to the reunion, as Susan offered, “If anyone has or will be purchasing Harry’s Piano, I’ll be delighted to autograph the book while at the reunion.” Sukman albums are still available, and will soon be joined by another. “I am producing with Vincent Falcone (Sinatra’s musical director and my father’s dear friend) a CD of Harry Sukman music for piano and trio. I plan on having some of The High Chaparral themes performed,” Susan said, adding she promises to alert HC fans when the CD is released. Treasurer (or Chief Financial Officer): Manages financial operations, prepares budgets in consultation with other officers, presents regular financial reports to the board and membership if applicable, oversees fundraising activities or investments according to established guidelines, signs checks on behalf of organization as authorized by policy, ensures compliance with tax regulations related to finances. 5. texts.full_text: R spectroscopy for assigning resonances and understanding structure of molecules. In TOCSY, isotropic mixing between spins connected by scalar couplings leads to the transfer of magnetization from one spin to another allowing assignment of coupled spins. The efficiency with which this is done depends on various factors including strength of coupling constants as well as chemical shift differences between coupled spins. One popular method for achieving such a transfer in homonuclear systems, especially when dealing with small molecules or large biomolecules where scalar couplings can be weak and the spectra may have many overlapping resonances, involves using radio-frequency (RF) pulses designed to mix magnetization across all connected spin networks efficiently. However, traditional methods like MLEV-17 [^3] suffer from limitations such as being less efficient over a broad bandwidth. This is particularly problematic in systems where chemical shift dispersion can be quite large or when dealing with spins that have significantly different offsets due to their environment within the molecule. Therefore, there's been an ongoing quest for developing more robust and broadband mixing sequences. Chirp pulses [^4], which are adiabatic RF pulse schemes capable of providing uniform excitation over a wide frequency range without being overly sensitive to B1 field inhomogeneities or requiring precise calibration, offer one such pathway. These characteristics make them highly suitable for applications where broad band coverage is essential. In the following sections, we delve into how chirp pulses can be utilized not just for their typical application of excitation but also as a tool for mixing magnetization between coupled spins across wide bandwidths - an approach termed "chirp mixing". texts.full_text: Bristol City. Bristol City reached the semifinals of that season's competition before losing to Newcastle United. In his first full campaign, Rodgers was primarily used as cover at centre half and also occasionally played right back or even left mid-fielder depending on who else would be playing in those positions (e.g. when either Andy Watson - the regular Right Back – moved up front for a partnership with Eric Delgado). He made his first team debut against Crewe Alexandra, where he started at centre half and went off after only twenty minutes due to injury. The following season saw him play in eighteen matches (seven of them as substitute) which included two goals. He scored the second goal for Bristol City when they beat Huddersfield Town 2-0 on New Year's Day, his first competitive match that year and he also netted a last minute equaliser against West Bromwich Albion at home in front of over twenty thousand spectators. He was primarily used as cover to the regular centre halves (Maurice Ingram & Andy Watson) until 1973 when Mauricio Pochettino became first choice. The next season saw him play nineteen matches and he scored two goals again, including a winner against Manchester City at Maine Road which remains one of his best ever performances. texts.full_text: xt remain largely unexplored. Here we demonstrate for the first time that siRNA-mediated knockdown or pharmacological inhibition of HKII significantly reduces PDAC cell proliferation both _in vitro_ (Figure 1) as well as tumorsphere formation capacity ([Supporting Information](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6392851/#sec04)). This inhibitory effect was accompanied by decreased glucose uptake and lactate secretion, indicating a reduction in glycolytic flux. Additionally, HKII inhibition led to increased intracellular reactive oxygen species (ROS) levels ([Supporting Information](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6392851/#sec04)) which could contribute towards the observed growth inhibitory effects through cell cycle arrest and apoptosis induction. In conclusion our findings suggest that HKII plays a crucial role in PDAC progression by facilitating glucose metabolism. Targeting this enzyme may thus serve as an attractive therapeutic strategy

texts.full_text: V Science & Tech Life & Culture Politics Dazed 100 Magazine Search Contact About Jobs Legal Dazed Media Another Another Man Nowness Dazed Studio PhotographyLightbox 25April 2014 TextAnastasiia Fedorova Share Gabriel Orlowski The Warsaw punk scene unveiled PhotographyLightbox Polish photographer Gabriel Orlowski's timeless diary of youthful midnight ramblings 25April 2014 TextAnastasiia Fedorova Real photography isn't so much about capturing what you see, but revealing the unseen. 25-year-old Gabriel Orlowski documents today’s Warsaw punk scene, the story of both real-time struggle against social injustice in Poland and the youthful midnight ramblings of a guy from a punk band. Orlowski’s latest book Anti-Accent (named after the ghost note with a rhythmic value but no distinguishable pitch when played) and his upcoming series Eden are a timeless analog photo diary of youth. His images are all about the energy in a moment – a sparkle from the bonfire or an anonymous kiss, they are deliberately dark, blurry and grainy, with faces transformed by the unpredictable chemistry of polaroids. Orlowski says that through blurred lines and faded details he makes the spectator “imagine and discover details to make up for what he couldn’t capture”, he brings real life’s accidents and failures back into photography. In a world oversaturatedwith digital perfection and filters that remove the essence of real life, Orlowski’s work stands out for its authenticity and rawness. Each of his photographs, whether on a Polaroid or a digital capture, bears the imperfections and the accidental beauty of life. texts.full_text: complex issue. I could write about the wAste of taxpayer money which is the Environment Agency. “Not fit for purpose” was one of the draft titles of this post. Ask anyone around here with the remotest connection to land about dredging rivers and then stand back. Until 20 (or so) years ago when the EA went along with the EU and put a stop to it, farmers were left to manage rivers as they saw fit - including regular clearing of debris which helped maintain flow during heavy rains. But now we're stuck in this bureaucratic quagmire where action is stifled by red tape. It's maddening how the EA has become a lightning rod for frustration, especially when flood waters rise and homes are inundated again—despite warnings from locals who know their land better than any desk-bound official ever could. The problem isn't just about dredging; it’s also planning laws that allow building on known high-risk areas. texts.full_text: (the limit is quite small), I just want to implement it in a DB. Any ideas? A: In SQLite or any other relational database management system, you cannot directly fill values with unique random numbers as this would violate SQL constraints. However here are few workarounds that might help achieve your requirement: 1) Use an autoincrement column: You can create a table where one of the columns is AUTOINCREMENT which will automatically assign it's last assigned value + 1 whenever you insert new data. CREATE TABLE example_table ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value_column TEXT NOT NULL ); 2) Using triggers or functions to manage your unique constraint, SQLite does not have a built-in mechanism for this. You would need some application-level logic that will keep track of the last value and use it as fill. 3) Use an Application Level Logic: Maintain another table which keeps record on available slot in previous
